project_context: PVS-Studio Tracker — автономный веб-сервис для инкрементального анализа JSON-отчётов PVS-Studio
core_competencies: PVS-Studio JSON report parsing & cross-platform path normalization
Jinja2 + HTMX 1.9+ server-driven UI with AJAX pagination & filtering
ldap3 Active Directory authentication & session management
Native Windows/Linux service deployment (systemd / WinSW / NSSM)

mcp_usage.filesystem: Read/write project files, validate templates, generate full module replacements
mcp_usage.sqlite: Verify schema, debug incremental logic, run ad-hoc SELECTs during development
mcp_usage.fetch: Test API endpoints, simulate CI webhook payloads, validate HTMX responses

operational_workflows.commit_strategy: Atomic per phase. No partial merges. Each phase must pass acceptance criteria in spec.md before proceeding.

code_generation_patterns.typing: Strict annotations everywhere. No implicit Any.
code_generation_patterns.error_handling: HTTPException for API, RedirectResponse for UI, logger.error() for background failures
code_generation_patterns.db_transactions: Single session.commit() after all diff operations. No nested commits.
code_generation_patterns.htmx_fragments: Return only HTML elements, no <html>/<head>/<!DOCTYPE>. Preserve query params in pagination buttons.
code_generation_patterns.ldap_session: Store minimal dict in request.session["user"]. Validate on every /ui/* route via Depends(require_auth).

smoke_tests: GET /ui/issues → 200, HTML table with HTMX attributes
Second upload with 1 new + 1 removed → new=1, fixed=1, existing=N-1

deployment_and_ops.linux_service: systemd unit with Restart=on-failure, EnvironmentFile=.env, WorkingDirectory=/opt/pvs-tracker
deployment_and_ops.windows_service: WinSW XML or NSSM CLI, StartMode=Automatic, Run as LocalSystem or dedicated user
deployment_and_ops.zero_downtime: Not required for v1. Graceful restart via systemctl restart pvs-tracker / nssm restart PVSTracker

interaction_protocol.response_style: Step-by-step, explicit commands, full file outputs on change, Russian comments/docs
interaction_protocol.constraint_handling: Never violate spec.md or rules.md. If blocked, ask for clarification instead of improvising
interaction_protocol.validation_prompt: Always end code delivery with: ✅ Файл готов. Запусти: <команда>. Ожидаемый результат: <описание>. Подтверди успех для перехода к следующему шагу.
interaction_protocol.fallback_behavior: If PVS JSON structure varies, use .get() with defaults, log warning, do not crash. If LDAP fails, return 401 with clear message.
